LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ALMA ALVARADO-ROMERO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND (PROPOSED RESPONSE) IS DENIED AS NO DEFAULT OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT HAS BEEN ENTERED. DEFENDANT MAY FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-25-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE AT THE HEARING A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S JANUARY 25 ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
